subject: [PATCH v5 06/18] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE bit macros to uffd

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch renames the uffd-wp PTE bit macros to simply 'uffd' across various architectures, including x86 and arm64. The change is purely mechanical and does not alter any behavior. This is done in preparation for userfaultfd RWP (Read-Write Protection) to use the same bit to mark access-tracking PTEs, distinct from mprotect(PROT_NONE) or NUMA-hinting PTEs.
